# coverage

> A single Go binary that aggregates Cobertura coverage XML and JUnit
> test-result XML from every project in a repo into one Markdown or HTML report,
> with optional regression detection. Language-agnostic: anything that can emit
> Cobertura + JUnit works.

## The contract (stable interface)

Each project/test job produces two files in one shared directory:

- `coverage-<id>.xml` — Cobertura coverage
- `tests-<id>.xml` — JUnit test results (optional; the Tests column shows `—` if absent)

`<id>` is any workspace id you choose (it may contain dashes). Then, in one
aggregation job, download every `coverage-*` / `tests-*` artifact into a single
directory (`merge-multiple: true`) and run the tool once:

    coverage --input ./cov --output "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"      # Markdown
    coverage --input ./cov --output report.html                # HTML (auto-detected)

This contract is the thing to rely on. How each project *produces* those two
files is language- and version-specific (see the recipes) and changes over time.

## For AI assistants wiring this into a repo

1. Detect the repo's languages and, per project, run its test suite so it emits
   `coverage-<id>.xml` (Cobertura) and `tests-<id>.xml` (JUnit). Use the recipes
   below as a starting point, but adapt them to the repo's actual test setup and
   the current versions of the tools involved.
2. Upload both files as artifacts named `coverage-<id>` / `tests-<id>` (use
   `if: always()`).
3. Add one aggregation job that downloads them and runs `coverage` as above.
4. `coverage init` scaffolds this structure (report job + per-language test-job
   stubs); fill each stub's TODO using the matching recipe.

Tip: configure each tool to count *every* source file, not just the ones a test
imported (e.g. Vitest/Jest `all`/`collectCoverageFrom` over `src/**`, JS coverage
defaults to imported-only). It drops the number but makes it the real one and
surfaces untested files as 0% — see the per-language recipes.

## Per-language recipes

- Go: https://github.com/aanantaco/coverage/blob/main/docs/GO.md
- TypeScript/JavaScript: https://github.com/aanantaco/coverage/blob/main/docs/TYPESCRIPT.md
- Rust: https://github.com/aanantaco/coverage/blob/main/docs/RUST.md
- Python: https://github.com/aanantaco/coverage/blob/main/docs/PYTHON.md
- Java: https://github.com/aanantaco/coverage/blob/main/docs/JAVA.md
- C#/.NET: https://github.com/aanantaco/coverage/blob/main/docs/CSHARP.md

## Reference

- Docs index: https://github.com/aanantaco/coverage/blob/main/docs/README.md
- Config (coverage.yaml): https://github.com/aanantaco/coverage/blob/main/coverage.yaml.example
- Ignore (.coverageignore): https://github.com/aanantaco/coverage/blob/main/.coverageignore.example
- Regression / deltas across runs: https://github.com/aanantaco/coverage/blob/main/docs/REGRESSION.md
- Example workflow: https://github.com/aanantaco/coverage/blob/main/examples/coverage.yml
- coverage init: https://github.com/aanantaco/coverage/blob/main/docs/INIT.md
